{
  "claims": [
    "The Pink Tax is a sexist penalty based purely on gender.",
    "Women are expected to pay more for products marketed to them with no substantial differences in quality.",
    "More than half of women's products cost more than the same product marketed to men, according to a study by the New York City Department of Consumer Affairs.",
    "Women make up as much as 85% of consumer purchases in the United States.",
    "The Pink Tax represents an inequity that impacts women's financial recovery after the COVID-19 pandemic.",

  ]
